properties.TEXT: Clinical Trial Report: Drug XR-7 Phase II Results This report summarizes the Phase II clinical trial of Drug XR-7 conducted at Massachusetts General Hospital between January 2024 and September 2024. A
Clinical Trial Report: Drug XR-7 Phase II Results This report summarizes the Phase II clinical trial
Clinical Trial Report: Drug XR-7 Phase II Results This report summarizes the Phase II clinical trial of Drug XR-7 conducted at Massachusetts General Hospital between January 2024 and September 2024.
conducted at Massachusetts General Hospital between January 2024 and September 2024
A total of 240 patients were enrolled across three treatment arms.
The primary endpoint was reduction in systolic blood pressure at 12 weeks.
Table 1: Patient Demographics. For Drug XR-7 (n=80), the Mean Age (years) is 58.3. For Placebo (n=80
For Drug XR-7 (n=80), the Mean Age (years) is 58.3.
For Placebo (n=80), the Mean Age (years) is 57.1.
For Standard Care (n=80), the Mean Age (years) is 59.0.
For Drug XR-7 (n=80), the Female (%) is 52.5%.
For Standard Care (n=80), the Female (%) is 51.3%.
For Drug XR-7 (n=80), the BMI (kg/m2) is 28.4 +/- 3.2.
For Standard Care (n=80), the BMI (kg/m2) is 28.1 +/- 3.0.
For Drug XR-7 (n=80), the Diabetes (%) is 32.5%.
For Standard Care (n=80), the Diabetes (%) is 33.8%.
For Drug XR-7 (n=80), the Hypertension Stage II (%) is 67.5%.
For Placebo (n=80), the Hypertension Stage II (%) is 65.0%.
For Standard Care (n=80), the Hypertension Stage II (%) is 68.8%.
For Drug XR-7 (n=80), the Prior CV Events (%) is 15.0%.
For Placebo (n=80), the Prior CV Events (%) is 13.8%.
For Standard Care (n=80), the Prior CV Events (%) is 16.3%.
Baseline characteristics were well-balanced across the three groups. No statistically significant di
Baseline characteristics were well-balanced across the three groups.
No statistically significant differences were observed in age, gender distribution, or comorbidity prevalence (p > 0.05 for all comparisons).
